modules.name: Hello World
modules.description: A minimal example module that prints a greeting and shows a floating banner. Use it as a template for your own modules.

modules.name: Web Tint
modules.description: Visual filter overlay for any page. Includes night shift (amber blue-light filter), grayscale, high contrast, invert colors, and custom color tint. Adjustable intensity and color temperature. A superset of the former Night Shift module.

modules.name: Reading Mode
modules.description: Strip a page down to its readable content: hides sidebars, ads, sticky bars and footers, then re-centres the article with comfortable typography. Three themes (light / sepia / dark), custom font size and family, and estimated reading time.

modules.name: Selection Actions
modules.description: A floating action bar that appears when you select text on a page. Search (5 engines), copy, open as URL, translate, or share. Fully configurable — choose which actions appear and which search engine to use. A superset of the former Floating Search module.

modules.name: Auto Scroll
modules.description: Smoothly auto-scroll long pages — articles, feeds, manga, web fiction. A floating remote control lets you start, pause, and adjust speed (1x to 10x). Supports reverse scroll for comment sections and keyboard shortcuts (J toggle, [/] speed, R reverse).

modules.name: Force Dark
modules.description: Intelligently force any page into dark mode. Uses CSS color-scheme, smart background inversion, and text color correction — not a simple overlay. Attempts to preserve images, videos, and embedded content while darkening the page chrome.

modules.name: Element Blocker
modules.description: Block annoying page elements — ads, cookie banners, sticky bars, popups, newsletter prompts — using CSS selectors. Add your own rules or use the built-in defaults. Click the panel button to enter picker mode and tap any element to block it permanently on that site.

modules.name: Find in Page
modules.description: Ctrl+F style in-page search bar. Highlights all matches, navigate with up/down arrows or Enter, shows match count and current position. Supports case-sensitive and regex modes. Opens via the floating panel button.

modules.name: TV D-Pad Cursor
modules.description: A virtual mouse cursor controlled by the D-pad on Android TV, Fire TV, and TV boxes. Move with arrow keys, click with Enter, long-press Enter to open settings. Includes movement acceleration, edge scrolling, click highlighting, and page zoom.
